profile_paragraph.formatted_text: Experienced Assistant Educator with over 6 years of expertise in Early Childhood Education, Nursery care, and Storypark documentation. Awarded 'Employee of the Month' in March 2023 for designing an impactful Easter display. Combines technical proficiency with strong early childhood education skills to drive high-quality care and family engagement. Seeking to leverage expertise in Qualified Early Childhood Educator (Diploma) role at City of Melbourne.

bullets: Prepared morning room environments featuring toys and books
Drafted daily updates for parents via Storypark app
Maintained hygiene standards through cleaning of high chairs and floors
Awarded 'Employee of the Month' in **March 2023** for Easter display
Provided dedicated care for **3** different families in Hawthorn area
Cared for children aged between **6** months and **10** years old
Managed dinner, bath time, and bedtime story reading routines
Maintained storefront cleanliness, including windows and floors

data.coverletter_body:
The Qualified Early Childhood Educator (Diploma) position at City of Melbourne is a strong match for my background in nursery care and documentation. My success as an Assistant Educator at Happy Feet Early Learning Giant—recognised by an 'Employee of the Month' award for creative display design—demonstrates my commitment to delivering high-quality, engaging environments that reflect childhood developmental milestones.

At Happy Feet, I have cultivated a deep understanding of the Early Years Learning Framework (EYLF) and National Quality Standards (NQS), ensuring all programming meets regulatory benchmarks. I regularly use the Storypark app to document developmental observations and maintain transparent, daily communication with families. Managing the nursery room has allowed me to refine my skills in responsive care, child safety, and the delivery of inclusive, play-based learning experiences that foster growth in children aged 0-2 years.

I admire City of Melbourne’s ‘Team Melbourne’ culture and its focus on treating children as active agents in their own learning. Your dedication to outdoor learning and education for sustainability resonates with my own professional focus, such as my work with gardening and creative arts programming. I value this alignment and would welcome the chance to contribute to the excellence of the North Melbourne or Lady Huntingfield centres.

I am available to discuss how my skills and experience can support the City of Melbourne's early childhood services at your convenience. Thank you for considering my application.

Chloe Simmons
Chloe Simmons | chloe_b_simmons@email.com | 0411 000 000 | 12/45 Glenferrie Road, Hawthorn | 

2 April 2026

Re: Qualified Early Childhood Educator (Diploma) — City of Melbourne

Dear Hiring Manager,

The Qualified Early Childhood Educator (Diploma) position at City of Melbourne is a strong match for my background in nursery care and documentation. My success as an Assistant Educator at Happy Feet Early Learning Giant—recognised by an 'Employee of the Month' award for creative display design—demonstrates my commitment to delivering high-quality, engaging environments that reflect childhood developmental milestones.

At Happy Feet, I have cultivated a deep understanding of the Early Years Learning Framework (EYLF) and National Quality Standards (NQS), ensuring all programming meets regulatory benchmarks. I regularly use the Storypark app to document developmental observations and maintain transparent, daily communication with families. Managing the nursery room has allowed me to refine my skills in responsive care, child safety, and the delivery of inclusive, play-based learning experiences that foster growth in children aged 0-2 years.

I admire City of Melbourne’s ‘Team Melbourne’ culture and its focus on treating children as active agents in their own learning. Your dedication to outdoor learning and education for sustainability resonates with my own professional focus, such as my work with gardening and creative arts programming. I value this alignment and would welcome the chance to contribute to the excellence of the North Melbourne or Lady Huntingfield centres.

I am available to discuss how my skills and experience can support the City of Melbourne's early childhood services at your convenience. Thank you for considering my application.

Yours sincerely,

Chloe Simmons
